title: manihot curcas
intro: Manihot curcas, also known as the girasole or jatropha, is a perennial plant native to the Americas and parts of Africa. It is a member of the Euphorbiaceae family and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Manihot curcas include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and anti-cancer agent. Manihot curcas can be prepared as an herbal remedy through the extraction of its sap, which can be used to make ointments, salves, or infusions, or through the use of its leaves, roots, or seeds in decoctions or tinctures.
